summary: Base W8 — scheduled −30% deload (~14 mpw) and the first week under the v4.3 mileage reshape (peak 38→28 mpw; all quality preserved, Adj #67). The week's one hard run (3×6 @ T) ran Wed: 7:45/7:56/7:47 at RPE 7 = 2nd straight T quick of the 8:00 lock → T target nudged to 7:50–7:55 for W9 Tue (Adj #77). Two reactive tendons drive the posture — L Achilles (Adj #63) + R patellar (Adj #64): Vomero on easy/long runs, hill strides held (Adj #44), W9 step-up held until both tendons read AM-clean (Adj #65/#67). Fri (Adj #79 pull, Hyp B run fresh) LOGGED: lat 150→155 and pushdown 20→22.5/arm both landed on reps with set-3 failures (holds, Adj #80/#84); chest-supp row 90 FAILED fresh (8/4/5 all RIR 0) → revert 85, true load ceiling (Adj #81); Sat DB lateral established at 30 (Adj #82); preacher 60 hold finally cleared → 65 next (Adj #83); elbow mild ≤4/10 on pushdowns — §10.A clock stays reset (Adj #75/#84). Calf + abs punted to Sat post-long-run and the Fri post-lift run SKIPPED outright (deload posture, not folded into Sat — Adj #85). AM tendon reads Fri BOTH CLEAN — first both-clean AM of the deload, ledger 2 of 4 (Tue sore / Wed clean / Thu sore / Fri clean): Sat + Sun AM reads decide the Sun 6/14 W8→W9 boundary (repeat deload-level vs W9 step-up ~20 mpw, Adj #65/#78/#86).

days.note: Logged — 30 min, treadmill 1%, 10:45/mi (Z1 ceiling), cadence 168, HR avg 160/peak 168. SI clean; L Achilles pain-free during, R knee quiet (first no-signal read since #63) — AM read not given, holds persist (Adj #70).

Logged — Incline AMRAP re-test 135×10 RIR 0 → e1RM 180, new TM 162 (Adj #71); DB lat first 6-set dose @ 30 held (#72); preacher 60 hold persists (#73); pushdown SWAPPED to unilateral cable 20/arm, clean (#74, elbow #75); crunch BW holds. L Achilles NOT AM-clean, R knee clean (#76).

Logged — 3×6 @ 7:45/7:56/7:47 (HR avgs 175/177/180) RPE 7/RIR 2, outdoor, Zoom Fly 6. 2nd straight T quick of 8:00 → T target nudged 7:50–7:55 for W9 Tue (Adj #77). AM all-green; very minor Achilles early, resolved mid-run.

Logged — 25 min, treadmill 1%, 10:43/mi, HR avg 168 (hot for easy — anchor by pace, Adj #9). SI clean. TENDONS REGRESSED: L Achilles AM sore = NOT AM-clean; R patellar signal DURING, first since 6/6 (Adj #78).

days.session: Hyp B (Adj #79 pull; run skipped, calf + abs punted)
days.note: Logged — lat 155 landed-on-reps hold (#80); row 90 FAILED → revert 85 (#81); Sat DB lat established 30 (#82); preacher 60 cleared → 65 next (#83); pushdown 22.5/arm landed-on-reps hold, elbow mild ≤4/10 (#84); calf + abs punted to Sat, post-lift run SKIPPED (#85). AM reads BOTH tendons clean — ledger 2/4 (#86).

days.session: Long Z1 45 min + punted calf/abs mini-circuit (Adj #85)
days.note: Long trimmed to 45 (deload), flat, Vomero (Adj #34). Post-run: seated calf 325 controlled, NO last-set failure (335 held, #40) + decline crunch BW 3×10 Sat-slot debut (#66). Report AM tendon reads — Fri was both-clean; Sat + Sun AMs decide the Sun 6/14 boundary (Adj #65/#78/#86).

Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1, daily SI prehab. Walking fine. W8→W9 boundary: recheck BOTH tendons (AM Achilles + R patellar) — clean = W9 step-up proceeds; still reactive = repeat a deload-level week (Adj #65/#67).
